title: Gallery Wall Design & Installation
description: We plan the full arrangement to scale, then install every piece with hardware matched to your wall type. One visit, zero damage, zero guesswork.

title: Single-Piece Art Hanging
description: Every piece — from small prints to oversized canvases — gets proper hardware, a level hang, and exact placement before we leave.

title: Artwork Relocation
description: Moving, redecorating, or staging a home for sale? We take pieces down safely, handle transport, and reinstall them exactly where you want them.

title: Auction Acquisition & Installation
description: Just won at Christie's, Sotheby's, or a local estate sale? We coordinate post-auction pickup and deliver straight to your wall.

title: Collection Cataloging
description: A detailed inventory of every piece you own: dimensions, condition notes, current placement, and provenance. Invaluable for insurance and estate planning.

title: Commercial & Corporate Spaces
description: Lobbies, offices, hospitality venues. We work after hours if needed and handle large-scale multi-room installations from start to finish.
